#
# _Alfredo Ortiz: Hispanics Flourishing in Trump Economy_
“President Trump's economy is the rising tide that is lifting all boats. This is especially true for Hispanics, who were among the biggest victims of the low-growth, high-regulation economy under President Obama,” Job Creators Network CEO Alfredo Ortiz writes in _The Hill_. “Last week, the Census Bureau announced new household income numbers, which showed that median income for Hispanic households grew by 3.7 percent, adjusted for inflation, last year. That’s more than double the increase seen by all households . . . That’s welcome news as the nation celebrates Hispanic Heritage Month.” [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE5Ljk1MDg2MjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOS45NTA4NjI1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4MDc3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/alfredo-ortiz-hispanics-flourishing-trump-economy/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) “U.S. President Donald Trump welcomed developments on Wednesday at an inter-Korean summit in the North Korean capital of Pyongyang as ‘very exciting,’” [**_Reuters_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE5Ljk1MDg2MjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOS45NTA4NjI1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4MDc3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.reuters.com/article/us-northkorea-southkorea-summit-trump/trump-hails-exciting-agreements-by-north-koreas-kim-idUSKCN1LZ0FD) reports. “Kim Jong Un has agreed to allow nuclear inspections, subject to final negotiations, and to permanently dismantle a test site and launch pad in the presence of international experts,” the President wrote on Twitter. “Biological threats emanate from many sources, and they know no borders,” President Trump said in a statement yesterday as his Administration released its National Biodefense Strategy. “They have great potential to disrupt the economy, exact a toll on human life, and tear at the very fabric of society.” The President has tasked Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar with leading the Federal review, Tom Howell, Jr. reports for [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE5Ljk1MDg2MjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOS45NTA4NjI1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4MDc3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/sep/18/trump-tasks-hhs-ongoing-review-biodefense/). “A top economic adviser to President Ronald Reagan said Tuesday that President Barack Obama deserves no credit for the booming U.S. economy, and said all of the credit belongs to President Trump,” Pete Kasperowicz writes in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE5Ljk1MDg2MjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOS45NTA4NjI1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4MDc3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/credit-trump-not-obama-for-economic-boom-says-reagan-adviser). On Fox News, renowned economist Art Laffer, who served on Reagan's Economic Policy Advisory Board, “credited the tax cut and Trump's push to deregulate parts of the U.S. economy for the explosive growth.” In [**_The Wall Street Journal_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE5Ljk1MDg2MjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOS45NTA4NjI1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4MDc3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/the-corporate-tax-cut-is-paying-for-itself-1537310846), Stephen Moore writes that the recent business tax cut is effectively paying for itself because of faster-than-expected growth. “Corporate tax revenues are down this year, but receipts from nearly every other tax source are rising at the federal and state levels. The higher growth this year alone will give states and cities almost $20 billion in windfall revenue,” Moore says.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE5Ljk1MDg2MjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOS45NTA4NjI1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4MDc3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE5Ljk1MDg2MjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOS45NTA4NjI1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4MDc3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE5Ljk1MDg2MjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOS45NTA4NjI1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4MDc3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

Friends -
Republicans have put aside their duty to the Constitution in a rush to confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court - even forcing the start of hearings before the Senate could fully review his records.
But now, it's not just his credentials in question. Kavanaugh has been accused of sexual assault, yet Senate Republicans still hope to confirm him as soon as possible.

**So I'm speaking out: Until the allegation has been fully examined, we cannot move forward with Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation. There must be a full FBI investigation into the allegation against this nominee and a fair hearing with corroborating witnesses invited to testify. **

I stand for the Constitution and for survivors of sexual assault, and I'd like to hear from you. Will you take just a moment to share your thoughts on this confirmation process with me?

You can use this link:**[https://surveys.signforgood.com/cjs-kavanaugh-confirmation](http://surveys.signforgood.com/cjs-kavanaugh-confirmation?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk913-su-nd)**

name: Josh Hawley
subject: I found this on Twitter - you have to see it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
The New York Times is in Claire's corner.Peter,

I don't know if you saw this on Twitter today, but it is pretty shocking. This comes from a Twitter that does nothing but track edits the New York Times makes to their own stories. This time, though, the account did more: it magnified their clear liberal bias.

That's right - someone at the New York Times tried to write an honest headline about Senator McCaskill caring more about spending time with her Washington insider friends than she does in Missouri, but of course, the mainstream media couldn’t have that. So instead, the powers that be at the New York Times had made sure to paint her in a positive light, putting left-wing flattery before truth once again.

We need all the help we can get to overcome the profound bias of the media. It’s apparently not enough that Senator McCaskill has Hollywood donors on her side, now we have proof the press is in her corner too. They don't care about us, they only care about helping Claire win this election.

Please, make your donation immediately to fight this fake news.

body:
| | Derek, Tim Kaine is my Senator and I am grateful for that.

I trust his wisdom and leadership. I trust his judgment. I always know that Senator Kaine will aim to do the right thing and represent not just my best interests, but those of every Virginian.

Because of this, I've donated to his re-election, I've volunteered my time at his offices, and I go to events for his campaign when he comes to my town. **It 's also why I'm writing you today:**
* \-- Senator Kaine's staff tells me that this is his most critical month. They need to hit their goal before the deadline is closed to fund the next two months of the campaign.

* \-- I also know that the actions we do as citizens matter. Speaking up, supporting, and donating to campaigns can decide elections.

**So today I 'm asking you to join me in supporting Tim Kaine so he meets his fundraising deadline and can fully fund a Democratic victory in my home state. It is so important that Senator Kaine can continue to serve and defend Virginia's values and protect our basic rights, i.e. health care, sustainable wages for Virginians, our environment, safe schools and neighborhoods for our children, support for veterans and veterans' families, and upholding our constitutional order - all of which are under attack by the current administration in Washington.

He has done so admirably for many years, and I would like him to represent me for many more. I've spoken at the Democratic Convention and campaigned for Democrats across the country, _but this is personal for me as a Virginian._

This is my Senator. He knows my family, he knows our loss, and he knows our mission now to elect representatives who will advance our _true, shared American values_. We are a Gold Star family that has made the ultimate sacrifice for our country and Derek, we are also a proud Virginia family.

**We need to re-elect Senator Kaine and Democratic congressional candidates in Virginia, Derek. I hope you 'll help today.**

body:
[1]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7662?refcode=em20180919&t=1001&akid=11264%2E444211%2EKILumF ]ALERT: Beto LEADS by 2! Pitch in now to keep the momentum »

A brand-new poll released moments ago by Reuters and the UVA Center for
Politics took a serious look at likely voters in Texas. Here’s what they
found:

“Representative Beto O'Rourke of Texas had a 2-percentage-point LEAD over
Cruz among likely voters in the state”

This is the first major poll of the campaign that has shown our grassroots
campaign AHEAD of Cruz. And it’s an incredible sign of what can happen if
we continue to work every hour of every day, continue to talk to every
voter in every county, and continue to do everything we can to get Beto’s
back.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7662?refcode=em20180919&t=1020&akid=11264%2E444211%2EKILumF ]Can you rush a contribution of
$3
to Beto’s campaign right now? Help us fund our proven organizing efforts
on the ground to reach more Texans and keep the momentum going.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7662?refcode=em20180919&t=1021&akid=11264%2E444211%2EKILumF ]Contribute
$3
»

This is a pivotal moment. And we absolutely can’t afford to take anything
for granted. We’ve got to keep our heads down and work harder than ever
before to elect Beto. That means knocking on more doors. Making more phone
calls. Having more and more conversations with Texans about Beto’s
positive, people-powered campaign for U.S. Senate.

But we’ve got to face the facts -- there are PACs, Super PACs, and special
interest groups waking up to this same news. They’re going to double and
triple down on their efforts to slow our momentum and retake the lead.

Reuters says all signs point to a “tightening Texas race.” Together, we’re
building the largest Get Out The Vote (GOTV) campaign in Texas history --
because that’s what it’s going to take to win this. And it’s going to take
every single one of us digging deep and chipping in what we can.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7662?refcode=em20180919&t=1022&akid=11264%2E444211%2EKILumF ]Pitch in a contribution to
Beto’s campaign right now and help us respond to these poll numbers.

Thanks for making our campaign possible.

Let’s go,

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7662?refcode=em20180919&t=1023&akid=11264%2E444211%2EKILumF ]Contribute

subject: To all of our first responders: ‘Thank you!’
body:
| |
---
The White House • September 19, 2018
## To all of our first responders: ‘Thank you!’
##
##
**As President Donald J. Trump** visits the Carolinas today, nearly 20,000 Federal employees have been mobilized to help restore power, rescue stranded victims, and assist in all aspects of the recovery following Hurricane Florence. **The numbers** behind the Federal response:
* More than 2,000 rescues and nearly 15,000 individuals sheltered by FEMA

* Some 6,000 active-duty personnel and 7,000 National Guardsmen on scene
* At least 400 lives—and 200 pets—saved by the U.S. Coast Guard
* More than 100 priority sites beginning to be assessed by the EPA
* 40,000 individuals working with the Department of Energy to restore power
* 535 rescue-and-evacuation missions and counting performed or supported by the National Guard in North Carolina

**The President delivered** a, clear message during his visit to affected communities today: “The Federal Government is behind you.” He thanked state leaders, first responders, and local officials for working around the clock to help all victims get the assistance they need. “Whatever we need from Washington, we are there.” **The widespread devastation of this storm** demands a Government-wide response, and that is what the Trump Administration has worked to deliver. The Department of Veterans Affairs is moving to open facilities that were closed by the storm, and the Small Business Administration has announced assistance for homeowners, renters, and businesses of all sizes in addition to opening a business recovery center. [**Learn how the Trump Administration is supporting the Florence recovery effort**.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE5Ljk1MTE2OTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOS45NTExNjk0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4NDAwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-administration-providing-support-impacted-hurricane-florence/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Watch:** [**President Trump addresses the storm while visiting North Carolina.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE5Ljk1MTE2OTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOS45NTExNjk0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4NDAwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5fX5y8RZeZE)
## Number of new heroin users cut in half
##
**The scale of America’s opioid crisis** can be daunting, with more than 72,000 drug overdose deaths in 2017—most of them involving opioids. But everywhere the crisis has struck, there are signs of hope and resilience. Every life saved from addiction is an important victory. And just last week, the country got encouraging news. **The Department of Health and Human Services (HHS)** has**** released its annual survey of American drug use and mental health. “For the second year in a row, the number of Americans misusing legal or illegal opioids dropped,” HHS Secretary Alex Azar writes in an op-ed today. **“Even more encouraging** , the number of Americans initiating heroin use dropped by around half from 2016 to 2017.” HHS’ survey provides hard and welcome evidence that aggressive efforts from the Federal Government, local communities, faith-based organizations, and others are working for the people who need it most. **[Secretary Azar: As the opioid epidemic rages, signs of national progress](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTE5Ljk1MTE2OTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkxOS45NTExNjk0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg4NDAwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/trump-administration-making-progress-fight-opioid-epidemic/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **

subject: our race, in The New York Times -- again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
You might recall that The New York Times profiled Abigail and our campaign's growing grassroots support a few weeks ago. Well, the Times featured us again today, naming VA-7 one of the "Battlefield" districts that will determine control of the House.
| | Peter, You might recall that _The New York Times_ profiled Abigail and our campaign's growing grassroots support a few weeks ago. Well, **the _Times_ featured us again today, naming VA-7 one of the ****"****Battlefield****" ****districts that will determine control of the House.** The _Times_ interviewed several voters in our district for this story, and their responses echoed what we hear while knocking doors every day: Our community is looking for a responsible, consensus-minded leader like Abigail to represent us in 2018. **One supporter, who voted for Rep. Brat in the last election, commented on Abigail 's "good character" and noted that "that's something missing right now" in Washington.** Abigail's message is resonating, Peter, and her compelling story and commitment to service are swaying undecided voters. [**Will you make a donation to our campaign today, so that we can continue to share Abigail 's message?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/h2HIuzVuSe_L377WX4QE-c_z4i69r3xnxMX1f7b2o8o=/dU3SNA0PRmNZk0_a5m8GXLeaAsmsz3SLBi2m_xDt0fc=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.19_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) We really are counting on [**your support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/h2HIuzVuSe_L377WX4QE-c_z4i69r3xnxMX1f7b2o8o=/dU3SNA0PRmNZk0_a5m8GXLeaAsmsz3SLBi2m_xDt0fc=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.19_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) in the final stretch of this race, Peter. After all, while we are gaining strength, this race remains a toss-up. The _Times_ article out today notes that VA-7 is moving in our direction, but it is still a "tricky" district for Democrats to win, and we expect it to be very close. [**Any level of support -- even $5 -- helps move us toward victory, so please consider contributing if you can.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/h2HIuzVuSe_L377WX4QE-c_z4i69r3xnxMX1f7b2o8o=/dU3SNA0PRmNZk0_a5m8GXLeaAsmsz3SLBi2m_xDt0fc=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.19_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Justin Jones _Communications Director, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/h2HIuzVuSe_L377WX4QE-c_z4i69r3xnxMX1f7b2o8o=/dU3SNA0PRmNZk0_a5m8GXLeaAsmsz3SLBi2m_xDt0fc=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.19_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/h2HIuzVuSe_L377WX4QE-c_z4i69r3xnxMX1f7b2o8o=/dU3SNA0PRmNZk0_a5m8GXLeaAsmsz3SLBi2m_xDt0fc=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/h2HIuzVuSe_L377WX4QE-c_z4i69r3xnxMX1f7b2o8o=/qwZ338zLUqkZe87uAHwa2Q2KOesi_BgXeOhVuhrS_EY=)_

Peter,

Brett Kavanaugh's lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court will mean a change in direction for our country for generations to come - leaving issues affecting Californians and Americans everywhere at stake.

We must take action now and let Kavanaugh and the Senate know that we stand against this nomination. With this letter, we can send a resounding message together. [**Read our letter below and click here to instantly add your name to the growing list of signers!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fDmyb6gF8UpOYHL0mm7QFVh3hvg_--T2NDkGvDR3tN4=/KANM4c9RqbIt62bVOdlygRVKqzyfv8KEmQ8Yf_gpJL8=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180919_1_1&amount=5.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)

| Dear Senators,

Brett Kavanaugh's record as a judge has made it clear that he should not be confirmed to a lifetime appointment on the Supreme Court.

On issues of environmental protections, labor, voting rights, and more, **he does not represent our values.**

That's why I'm taking a stand today. As a citizen concerned for the future of our country, I urge you to reject Kavanaugh's nomination.
**[Add your name instantly->](https://act.myngp.com/el/fDmyb6gF8UpOYHL0mm7QFVh3hvg_--T2NDkGvDR3tN4=/ur9zYoxaqDBrnGJ6wHA3CYUaAx3YYgeRX9PkdtiWI0g=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180919_1_1&amount=5.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)**
As a judge, Kavanaugh has ruled against executive accountability, upheld disenfranchisement, and undermined workers' rights.

Kavanaugh's confirmation will tip the balance of the court, making it that much easier to overturn the landmark Roe v. Wade case. The health of women across the country is at stake.

If he is confirmed, I will continue to fight for our values and demand Congress not let years of progress be undone.

**With this letter, I am standing with my fellow Americans who reject Kavanaugh 's extreme views.**
**[Sign the letter right away->](https://act.myngp.com/el/fDmyb6gF8UpOYHL0mm7QFVh3hvg_--T2NDkGvDR3tN4=/ur9zYoxaqDBrnGJ6wHA3CYUaAx3YYgeRX9PkdtiWI0g=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180919_1_1&amount=5.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)**
Sincerely,
**Peter Willis**

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Our goals do not change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
#
Peter -
First, I want to say thank you. Thank you for standing with us and doing everything you could to support us. It means the world to me.
While our race didn't go as we wanted, our movement showed up, demanded change and won some major victories.
We ousted 75% of the IDC members, and we all should be proud of that. It's a sign that things in New York and in Albany are changing. The iron grip of the Albany political machine and the financial establishment is loosening.
Our race proved that you can run a competitive statewide race without taking a cent of corporate money -- taking on Wall Street, Albany and big real estate. We showed that total independence makes you even more competitive.
And let's be clear: Our goals do not change with election results. Just the way that we get there. We're still fighting to:
End cash bail.
Break up corporate monopolies.
Stop taking corporate money.
Investigate Trump's businesses.
Stop luxury developers from abusing power.
Sue big pharma.
Investigate corruption and expose sexual misconduct in Albany.
Provide universal voting rights.
I'm staying in that fight, and I hope you will as well. The only way to get a democracy and economy that works for people, not corporations, is by organizing and fighting back.
Our movement has always been about more than one candidate or one race. It's about all of us, coming together, stepping up and demanding better. That fight continues today, tomorrow and every day until we get justice for all.
In solidarity,
Zephyr Teachout
P.S.
If you can afford it, I have one final ask. We ran to win and put it all on the line, but that means we have a small bit of debt. It's not much -- about 0.5% of what we spent. Covering this debt will allow us to pay our staff while we tie up loose ends and pay a few bills to the small businesses that supported our run. **[Can you make a donation-- of any amount -- to help us cover this gap?](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780950/6e822e2f/1d1b59c6/4173b16f/2210622634/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180919-full")**
Thank you again for everything.
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780950/6e822e2f/1d1b59c6/4173b16f/2210622634/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180919-full")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780950/6e822e2f/1d1b59c6/4173b150/2210622634/VEsF/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Covering this debt will allow us to pay our staff while we tie up loose ends and pay a few bills to the small businesses that supported our run. "" Thank you again for everything. "" * Paid for by Zephyr for NY 1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

| | Peter,

With just 48 days until Election Day, I'm writing to ask you to [**donate to help my colleague, Joe, win his close race for re-election.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2c8f/7377f838/38183af3/51f827a7/243058438/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tim-kaine-for-joe?refcode=20180919.1&amount=25") If you'll keep reading, I'll spell out exactly why Joe deserves your support at this pivotal moment.

First, Joe has fought tirelessly for our commonsense agenda. **When Republicans tried to take health care away from tens of millions of Americans, Joe stood up and helped stop them.** And when Mitch McConnell rushed his tax scheme through the Senate, Joe stood firmly against it.

Second, there's never been a more important time to elect (and re-elect) honest leaders who will fight to protect our Democratic values. On every issue from health care to foreign interference in our elections, **our country is facing unprecedented challenges -- which makes it all the more important to re-elect our Democratic senators.**

And third, **Joe 's in one of the closest Senate races in the country.** President Trump has already made trips to Indiana to campaign for his Republican opponent on two separate occasions. Every single analyst says the race is too close to predict. If Joe is going to win, it's going to take an outpouring of grassroots support from folks like you -- which is exactly why I'm reaching out.

| | **UPDATE: Senate Republicans have been trying to jam through a committee vote on Judge Brett Kavanaugh, originally scheduled for tomorrow.**

Now, in light of recent allegations, it is _even more_ of a necessity that we prevent a rushed confirmation vote from happening and slow this process down. We cannot overlook these charges or sweep them aside. Dr. Ford deserves fair and respectful treatment, unobstructed by partisan politics or artificial timelines.

**There 's one more thing, Derek, and it's the most important part of all. Call your Senators: (202) 224-3121.** Tell them that you're signing petitions, you're speaking up, and you're ready to learn the full truth about Judge Brett Kavanaugh - _and we need more time and a real investigation to hear that truth._

[Tim's Supreme Court petition is below.
